sprint.goal: Unblock CI across all open PRs (#1121), merge educate-mode fix (#1104), advance Go Kernel Phase 1 (#1086) and Stranger test (#919). KE-2 (#856) complete — v3.0 gate cleared.

senior.title: fix(adapters): educate mode always allows regardless of suggestion (PR #1104)
senior.note: PR #1104 has educate mode fix. Blocked on CI: lint (Prettier) + test-and-build (flaky go-fast-path). PR #1121 will fix both — once #1121 merges, rebase #1104 to unblock.

blockers.description: Systemic CI failure: 4 Prettier violations + flaky go-fast-path test (200ms timeout under load) causing lint+test failures on all 8 open PRs. PR #1121 fixes both — awaiting CI green.
SQLite native bindings missing in scheduler-spawned worktrees — governance runtime cannot start (better-sqlite3 not compiled for Node v22 ABI v127 in sub-worktrees)
blockers.resolution: Options: rebuild bindings, expose CLI on PATH, or add --no-sqlite fail-open flag

blockers.description: False positive: destructive command detection fires on shell heredoc/python content that mentions blocked command patterns (report text, not execution)
blockers.resolution: Distinguish base command from argument/content in destructive pattern matcher
